title: dolia micrantha
intro: Dolia micrantha is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of alkaloids that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dolia micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
